questions.question: What is the primary goal of information security?
Describe the principle of least privilege.
keyPoints: Grant users only the privileges they need
Prevent users from having too much power

questions.question: Explain the principle of separation of duties.
keyPoints: Prevent a single user from having too much power

questions.question: Describe the principle of defense in depth.
keyPoints: Protect against different types of attacks

questions.question: Explain the principle of fail-safe.
keyPoints: Design systems to fail in a secure state

questions.question: Compare and contrast the principles of least privilege and separation of duties.
keyPoints: Similarities and differences between the two principles
Examples of each principle in practice

questions.question: Describe the principle of complete mediation and explain its importance in information security.
keyPoints: Importance of complete mediation in preventing unauthorized access

questions.question: Explain the principle of open design and its role in ensuring the security of information systems.
keyPoints: Importance of open design in ensuring security
